title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Moderate thunderstorms are expected mainly for S Germany, Czechia & Austria.

---RISK AREAS---

ENHD
S Germany, Czechia, Austria & SW Poland

Multiple scattered thunderstorms are expected, supercells are not ruled out.
The main threats are:
- wind gusts - during thunderstorms up to 70+km/h are possible
- Hail - during some thunderstorms, mostly in Far SE Germany, could be up to 3-4cm.
- Heavy Rain - 40mm in 3hr are possible

---HATCHED AREAS---

HATCH #1
Czechia
M
oderate to strong thunderstorms are possible. The storm mode will most likely be an MCS which will travel from the NW to S of Bohemian-Moravian borders into N Austria.
The main Threats are:
- Strong wind gusts - up to 70km/h
- Hail - up to 2cm (3cm is also possible mainly in the Pardubice Region)
- Heavy Rain - around 30mm in 3hr

HATCH #2
S Austria

Strong thunderstorms are possible.
The main threats are:
- Strong wind gusts - up to 75+km/h (in mountain regions up to 110+km/h possible!)
- Heavy rain - up to 84mm in 3hr possible
- Flash flooding - due to heavy rain
- Hail - 2-3cm possible
